steps.t: Someone must have survived the attack on the Mead Hall. An advisor of the Reeve or a family member should be somewhere inside Woodhurst, in the north-…
Elda is near the Mead Hall in Woodhurst. Arnwi asked you to speak with Elda, another of the Reeve's advisors.
Arnwi is standing near the stable-master of Woodhurst. Elda refused to speak with you and told you to return to Arnwi.
Calin is in the farm-house on the eastern side of Woodhurst. Arnwi suggested that you speak next with the third advisor, Calin.
